---
title: "Projects"
---

Dr. Erin Futrell's FITT lab where I am an Analytics Consultant (yes, I wore the minimalist shoes and yes, I still do my "toe yoga").

    [Foot Intrinsic Testing and Training Lab](https://gulick.springfield.edu/fitt/)

Dr. Madeline Ratoza's Rehab Maps Research Lab with whom I collaborate on research about access and equity in physical therapy services using multiple data sources to create layered maps.

    [Rehab Maps Research Lab](https://www.madelineratoza.com/rehab-maps-research-lab)
